Apple___Apple_scab: Apply fungicide (Captan or Mancozeb). Remove infected leaves. Prune trees for air circulation.
Apple___Black_rot: Remove mummified fruits. Apply copper-based fungicide. Prune dead wood.
Apple___healthy: Plant is healthy! Maintain regular watering and fertilization.
Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_: Apply fungicide early. Use rust-resistant hybrid seeds.
Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight: Apply fungicide (propiconazole). Use resistant varieties. Rotate crops.
Corn_(maize)___healthy: Plant is healthy! Ensure proper nitrogen fertilization.
Grape___Black_rot: Apply mancozeb or myclobutanil. Remove infected berries. Improve air flow.
Grape___healthy: Plant is healthy! Monitor for pests regularly.
Potato___Early_blight: Apply chlorothalonil or mancozeb. Remove infected leaves. Avoid overhead irrigation.
Potato___Late_blight: Apply metalaxyl fungicide immediately. Destroy infected plants. Improve drainage.
Potato___healthy: Plant is healthy! Ensure proper hilling and irrigation.
Tomato___Bacterial_spot: Apply copper bactericide. Avoid wetting foliage. Use disease-free seeds.
Tomato___Early_blight: Apply chlorothalonil fungicide. Mulch around plants. Remove lower infected leaves.
Tomato___Late_blight: Apply mancozeb or chlorothalonil. Remove infected plants. Avoid overhead watering.
Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot: Apply copper fungicide. Remove infected leaves. Avoid wetting foliage.
Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider: Apply miticide or neem oil. Increase humidity.
Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus: No cure. Remove infected plants. Control whitefly population.
Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus: No cure. Remove and destroy infected plants. Disinfect tools with bleach.
Tomato___healthy: Plant is healthy! Maintain consistent watering and support with stakes.
